title: Algerian Chicken Tagine
description: A hearty and flavorful North African stew made with chicken, spices, and rice. This tagine is a comforting and aromatic dish perfect for a cold evening.
instructions: Heat oil in the bottom of a clay or ceramic tagine or large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add chicken and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Add spice blend and cook for 1 minute.
Add broth, water, and rice. Stir to combine.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 25-30 minutes, or until rice is cooked and chicken is tender.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs, if desired.
